title: Build CKC/Ingest dataset mining review pipeline
operator_request: Image ingest should select large datasets, mark images pass/reject/unsure, batch add tags/notes such as events/dates/location, and link passed images to a character sheet.

state_recovery.recovery_rule: Treat Ingest as a sibling Atelier tab and reuse CKC media linking instead of creating a disconnected sorter.

scope.summary: Make Ingest a real image-mining front end for CKC and LoRA dataset preparation.
base_scope: Select/import a large image dataset non-destructively.
Batch apply tags, notes, event names, dates, locations, and source metadata.
Link passed images to CKC character sheets/albums.
Make review state attributable and safe for parallel agents.
Update internal UserManual with Ingest review workflow.
acceptance_criteria: Ingest tab exposes dataset selection and review states.
Batch metadata can be applied without losing per-image notes.
Passed images can be linked to CKC characters.
Argus can inspect and steer the review workflow.
verification: Backend tests for ingest review states and batch metadata.
Native UI tests for review controls.
